products.title: The Beautiful Oil / 65 ml
products.description: Skin nourishment, bottled. A lightweight, active facial oil to treat signs of dehydration and impart a healthy, radiant glow.

products.title: Face Brushes / The Powder Brush
products.description: A luxuriously soft, oversized, fluffy brush with an angled design for maximum coverage and control. Built for seamless, blended powder application from light to full.

products.title: Face Brushes / The Concealer Brush
products.description: A perfect tool for applying and blending our Invisible Touch Concealer and Cream Foundation with precision. The soft, tapered bristles allow for seamless coverage and effortless blending, making it ideal for concealing blemishes, under-eye areas, and fine details with expert control.

products.title: Face Brushes / The Buffer-Concealer Brush
products.description: A versatile brush with a round, dense, and flat end designed to seamlessly apply concealer and foundation into small crevices, corners, and delicate areas around the eyes and nose. Its compact shape allows for precise, controlled application and blending in hard-to-reach zones.

products.title: Face Brushes / The Buffer-Glow Brush
products.description: A densely bristled brush built for targeted highlight placement. Use it to deliver a concentrated, high-beam effect precisely where light naturally hits the face.

products.title: Eye Brushes / The Soft Eye Brush
products.description: A versatile eye brush designed for seamless blending and applying generous sweeps of shadow across the eyelid. Its soft bristles glide effortlessly over the delicate eye area, making it ideal for building color.

products.title: Eye Pencil / Bright
products.description: Sketch precise, sharp styles and intense color with this easy-glide pencil, or smudge for a sultry finish and undone look. Bright: A soft beige khôl. "A pastel peach color made for lining the waterline and inner corners for an eye-brightening, refreshed look." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Eye Pencil / Black
products.description: Sketch precise, sharp styles and intense color with this easy-glide pencil, or smudge for a sultry finish and undone look. Black: An intense black khôl. "Black liner has been around forever because it’s so versatile. I’m excited to offer an organic version so gentle, you can even wear it on the inner rim of the eye." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Lengthening Mascara / Black
products.description: Your natural lashes but better: a little thicker, a little longer, and a little richer in color. Black: A creamy, deep-black pigment.

products.title: Im-Possible Mascara / Brown
products.description: Lash perfection with every stroke. Discover our certified-organic, refillable mascara that dramatically lengthens, thickens and defines your lashes from root to tip, for the ultimate lash transformation. Brown: A rich brown shade for a softer finish.

products.title: Im-Possible Mascara / Black
products.description: Lash perfection with every stroke. Discover our certified-organic, refillable mascara that dramatically lengthens, thickens and defines your lashes from root to tip, for the ultimate lash transformation. Black: A creamy, deep-black pigment. It lengthens and volumizes while cleanly defining each lash.

products.title: Powder Eye Shadow / Wisdom
products.description: Blendable, long-wearing and fool-proof eyeshadow, rich in color and effortless to apply. Wisdom: A mix of gray , brown and purple , this taupe works on all skin tones and eye colors. " Wisdom is my favorite Eye Shadow. Blue, green, or brown, it really brings out the color of everyone’s eyes." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Powder Eye Shadow / Pretty Purple
products.description: Blendable, long-wearing and fool-proof eyeshadow, rich in color and effortless to apply. Pretty Purple: A greyish purple hue that flatters all skin tones and all eye colors. “ Pretty Purple gives a flattering purple finish and adds beautiful depth to your eyes. While I love it for all eye colors, it’s my absolute go-to for blue and green eyes. It really makes them pop.” – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Powder Eye Shadow / Onyx
products.description: Blendable, long-wearing and fool-proof eyeshadow, rich in color and effortless to apply. Onyx: A black shadow with a subtle, silver shimmer . Onyx is our darkest, most dramatic color. "The iridescence in Onyx adds vibrancy to black shadow. It is a black with a sense of life to it." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Powder Eye Shadow / Magnetic
products.description: Blendable, long-wearing and fool-proof eyeshadow, rich in color and effortless to apply. Magnetic: A brownish-gold shadow, flattering to all skin tones and eye colors. " Magnetic is a modern take on gold eye shadow. I created this shade to be the perfect subtle touch of gold that’s wearable day or night." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Powder Eye Shadow / Grace
products.description: Blendable, long-wearing and fool-proof eyeshadow, rich in color and effortless to apply. Grace: A light mocha color with a semi-matte finish to flatter fair to medium-dark skin tones and all eye colors. "As a makeup artist, this is a color I reach for again and again. I love the subtle dimension it creates on its own. It's also beautiful when blended into a smokey eye." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Powder Eye Shadow / Earthy Calm
products.description: Blendable, long-wearing and fool-proof eyeshadow, rich in color and effortless to apply. Earthy Calm: A warm brown , great for all skin tones and all eye colors. " Earthy Calm is the most versatile brown. If you could only have one brown in your makeup bag, this would be it." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Powder Eye Shadow / Amethyst
products.description: Blendable, long-wearing and fool-proof eyeshadow, rich in color and effortless to apply. Amethyst: An iridescent taupe-lilac shade, flattering to all skin tones and eye colors. "As a makeup artist, rosy neutrals give me endless ideas. Amethyst is one of my favorites. It has this beautiful complexity to it, sitting between a taupe and a lilac, with an iridescence that catches the light in the most

products.title: Powder Eye Shadow / Charmed
products.description: Blendable, long-wearing and fool-proof eyeshadow, rich in color and effortless to apply. Charmed: A versatile beige that flatters all skin tones and all eye colors. "I wanted to create a beautiful beige shadow that worked well for everyone." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Powder Eye Shadow / Blue Wonder
products.description: Blendable, long-wearing and fool-proof eyeshadow, rich in color and effortless to apply. Blue Wonder: A perfect blue that flatters all skin tones and eye colors. " Blue Wonder is rich, deep, and very pigmented. It is a very flattering blue." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Powder Eye Shadow / Cloud Nine
products.description: Blendable, long-wearing and fool-proof eyeshadow, rich in color and effortless to apply. Cloud Nine: A light ivory color, great for fair to medium-dark skin tones and all eye colors. " Cloud Nine is a beautiful highlighter that brightens the eye area. It’s also a fantastic base for other colors." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Flush & Glow Duo / Vibrant Ray
products.description: A dual-color creamy compact to create a natural, healthy, fresh-faced look. Vibrant Ray: A sun-warmed coral Flush and a pale, luminous Glow . Perfect for a dewy, rosy cheeked flush, this duo contains Cream Blush in Joyful & Cream Glow in Ravishing .

products.title: Flush & Glow Duo / Luminous Flush
products.description: A dual-color creamy compact to create a natural, healthy, fresh-faced look. Luminous Flush: A warm, pink cream Flush and a sheer, bronze Glow . Create a sun-kissed, day-at-the-beach glow with this duo, which includes Cream Blush in Blossoming & Cream Glow in Lustrous .

products.title: Cream Blush / Sun Touched
products.description: Our pride and joy. A creamy and blendable flush of color that melts effortlessly into skin to sculpt and illuminate for a dewy finish. Sun Touched: A soft coral . Recommended for fair to medium-dark skin tones with neutral or golden undertones. " Sun Touched creates a gorgeous glow. This coral tone gives the wearer a youthful look, kissed by the sun." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Cream Blush / Reverence
products.description: Our pride and joy. A creamy and blendable flush of color that melts effortlessly into skin to sculpt and illuminate for a dewy finish. Reverence: A soft , cool pink . It is best for fair to medium complexions. "This is a lovely pink with blue undertones that makes it like a cooler-colored version of our best-seller Blossoming . It’s gorgeous on very pale to medium skin colors." – Kirsten Kjaer Wei

products.title: Cream Blush / Precious
products.description: Our pride and joy. A creamy and blendable flush of color that melts effortlessly into skin to sculpt and illuminate for a dewy finish. Precious: A soft , peachy coral . Best for light to medium complexions. " Precious is like a peachier sister to Embrace. It's the lightest blush in our coral color range." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Cream Blush / Lovely
products.description: Our pride and joy. A creamy and blendable flush of color that melts effortlessly into skin to sculpt and illuminate for a dewy finish. Lovely: A deep berry . Incredibly flattering on all skin tones, from fair to dark. " Lovely starts off sheer, but can be layered for stronger, bolder color thanks to the natural pigments and buildable formula." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Cream Blush / Joyful
products.description: Our pride and joy. A creamy and blendable flush of color that melts effortlessly into skin to sculpt and illuminate for a dewy finish. Joyful: A warm coral . Best for medium to dark complexions with olive or golden undertones. It can also work for those with fair to medium-dark skin tones. " Joyful is the perfect coral for a summery, warm, radiant glow." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Cream Blush / Inner Glow
products.description: Our pride and joy. A creamy and blendable flush of color that melts effortlessly into skin to sculpt and illuminate for a dewy finish. Inner Glow: A light , rosy taupe with an iridescent sheen. Recommended for fair to medium complexions. "A beautiful blush shade for fair to medium skin tones, and can also be used as a highlighter for medium to deep skin tones with its iridescence giving an illumin

products.title: Cream Blush / Happy
products.description: Our pride and joy. A creamy and blendable flush of color that melts effortlessly into skin to sculpt and illuminate for a dewy finish. Happy: A vibrant poppy pink . This highly pigmented pink is gorgeous on all skin tones and exceptional on darker complexions. "Everyone who’s seen this poppy pink just smiles, so we had to name it Happy ." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Cream Blush / Embrace
products.description: Our pride and joy. A creamy and blendable flush of color that melts effortlessly into skin to sculpt and illuminate for a dewy finish. Embrace: A soft , nude pink . Our lightest shade of Cream Blush, it is best for fair to light-medium skin tones. "This nude-pink is my go-to when just the palest hint of blush is needed. It creates a gorgeous, understated touch of color on the cheeks." – Kirsten Kj

products.title: Cream Blush / Desired Glow
products.description: Our pride and joy. A creamy and blendable flush of color that melts effortlessly into skin to sculpt and illuminate for a dewy finish. Desired Glow: A warm , soft neutral . Ideal for light to medium skin tones, and the perfect blush to balance redness-prone cheeks. " Desired Glow gives the illusion of a subtle tan, like you’ve just returned from holiday." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Cream Blush / Above and Beyond
products.description: Our pride and joy. A creamy and blendable flush of color that melts effortlessly into skin to sculpt and illuminate for a dewy finish. Above and Beyond: A highly pigmented coral red . This shade is especially flattering for medium to dark skin tones. " Above and Beyond is a fun, invigorating color that also looks amazing as a lip color." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: Cream Blush / Blushing
products.description: Our pride and joy. A creamy and blendable flush of color that melts effortlessly into skin to sculpt and illuminate for a dewy finish. Blushing: A deep coral with an iridescent sheen. Especially flattering for medium to dark skin colors.

products.title: Cream Blush / Abundance
products.description: Our pride and joy. A creamy and blendable flush of color that melts effortlessly into skin to sculpt and illuminate for a dewy finish. Abundance: A plummy taupe with an iridescent finish. Perfect for adding rich color for fair to medium skin tones. " Abundance is a plummy taupe with an iridescent finish. products.title: Cream Blush / Blossoming
products.description: Our pride and joy. A creamy and blendable flush of color that melts effortlessly into skin to sculpt and illuminate for a dewy finish. Blossoming: A soft, warm pink with a rosy hue. This best-selling color works beautifully on fair to medium-dark skin tones. " Blossoming is the perfect rosy hue for a glowing, fresh-faced look." – Kirsten Kjaer Weis

products.title: The Body Oil

products.title: The Beautiful Eye Balm

products.title: The Beautiful Primer

products.title: The Beautiful Hydration Serum

products.title: The Beautiful Oil / 30 ml
products.description: Skin nourishment, bottled. A lightweight, active facial oil to treat signs of dehydration and impart a healthy, radiant glow.

products.title: The Toner
products.description: An organically formulated essence for restoring your skin's optimal pH, heightened with the glow-boosting power of the Discorea Batatas root. It's also made to purify and calm your complexion, leaving it ready to receive hydration and essential nutrients.

products.title: The Cleanser
products.description: This soft, balm cleanser effectively removes impurities and long-wear makeup, gently and with minimal disruption to the skin's hydrolipid barrier. Organic, cold-pressed oils and naturally calming plant extracts leave your complexion soft and radiant looking.

products.title: Invisible Touch Concealer / D345 – Elegance
products.description: A lightweight, skincare-infused concealer that brightens, conceals and lifts. Our concealer offers flexible coverage from light to high to best suit your needs. Elegance: Best for deep skin with warm undertones.
